from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_includes_last_item():
    items = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    result = process_batch(items)
    assert len(result) == len(items), (
        f"process_batch skipped the last item: expected {len(items)} results, got {len(result)}"
    )
